top_issue: Report includes irrelevant findings and fails to provide actionable research guidance when facing predictable data gaps
Internal contradiction between claiming 'no evidence found' while simultaneously presenting specific evidence undermines the entire analysis framework
Critical source-question mismatch: using 30 irrelevant papers about AI calibration to answer questions about knowledge compounding, then drawing sweeping investment conclusions from this mismatch
Fundamentally fails to answer the question asked - provides cost speculation without value measurement, making any cost-benefit analysis impossible
Fabricated sources and statistics presented as legitimate evidence, undermining entire analysis credibility
